sections.subtitle: Recent Form
sections.text: Famalicão has struggled recently, with no wins in their last 4 matches and conceding in all of them, though they managed a strong 3-0 win in one of their last 5. Casa Pia shows mixed form with a recent 2-1 win against Sporting Braga but only 1 win in their last 5 matches, often conceding first. Both teams have shown inconsistency, with Famalicão slightly stronger at home.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head History
sections.text: In their last two encounters, Famalicão has the edge with a 2-0 home win, while the most recent match ended in a 1-1 draw at Casa Pia. Matches between these teams tend to be low-scoring, with under 2.5 goals in 5 of their last 6 head-to-heads.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Famalicão and Casa Pia are closely matched in the league standings, with Famalicão at 8th (44 points) and Casa Pia at 7th (45 points). Both teams have similar goal-scoring (42 for Famalicão, 38 for Casa Pia) and conceding records (38 vs 42), indicating a balanced contest. Famalicão’s slightly better home form and big chance conversion rate (48.3%) give them a marginal advantage.

sections.subtitle: Key Factors
sections.text: Famalicão’s ability to score first in recent home matches and Casa Pia’s tendency to concede early could be decisive. The referee’s average of 4.4 yellow cards per game aligns with both teams’ high card count trends in recent matches. Corners are likely to be moderate, given both teams average around 5 per game.
